violations.text: The Food Safety Manager License registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection is currently expired in must be reinstated as soon as possible. Application printed and left with PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The ceiling of the cookline side of the kitchen was observed to have a chipped/cracked surface coating and is need of repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026

Deli Meat(s) were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Per the PIC, deli meats are sliced for a week at a time. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The tiles on the floor of the cookline area are in poor repair (Chipped/Cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The tiles on the floor of the cookline area is in poor repair (Chipped/Cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The Open Air Cooler located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 56 degrees Fahrenheit at the time of inspection. Unit is to be repaired/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Pre-flush sprayer is to be adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
The tiles on the floor of the cookline area is in poor repair (Chipped/Cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
